name: Alert
desc: +5 initiative. Can't be surprised. Hidden attackers don't get advantage.

name: Athlete
desc: Stand from prone 5 ft. Climbing no extra cost. Short jump runups.

name: Actor
desc: Advantage Deception/Performance for impersonation. Mimic voices.

name: Charger
desc: Dash then bonus action melee (+5 dmg if 10 ft straight) or shove (10 ft).

name: Crossbow Expert
desc: Ignore loading. No disadvantage at 5 ft. Bonus action crossbow attack.

name: Defensive Duelist
desc: Reaction: +proficiency to AC vs melee (finesse weapon required).

name: Dual Wielder
desc: +1 AC dual wielding. Non-light weapons. Draw/stow two at once.

name: Dungeon Delver
desc: Advantage detecting secrets. Advantage saves vs traps. Trap resistance.

name: Durable
desc: Min HP from Hit Dice = 2 x CON mod.

name: Elemental Adept
desc: Ignore resistance for chosen element. Treat 1s as 2s on damage dice.

name: Grappler
desc: Advantage on attacks vs grappled. Can pin (both restrained).

name: Great Weapon Master
desc: Crit/kill gives bonus action melee. Heavy weapon: -5 hit/+10 damage.

name: Healer
desc: Stabilize gives 1 HP. Healer's kit: restore 1d6+4+maxHD HP.

name: Heavily Armored
desc: Heavy armor proficiency.

name: Heavy Armor Master
desc: -3 nonmagical bludgeon/pierce/slash while in heavy armor.

name: Inspiring Leader
desc: 10 min speech: 6 creatures get temp HP = level + CHA mod.

name: Keen Mind
desc: Know north, hours to sunrise/sunset. Perfect recall for 1 month.

name: Lightly Armored
desc: Light armor proficiency.

name: Linguist
desc: Learn 3 languages. Create written ciphers.

name: Lucky
desc: 3 luck points/long rest. Extra d20 on attack/check/save.

name: Mage Slayer
desc: Reaction melee on casters within 5 ft. Concentration disadvantage. Save advantage.

name: Magic Initiate
desc: 2 cantrips + 1st-level spell from any class (1/long rest).

name: Martial Adept
desc: 2 maneuvers + 1 superiority die (d6).

name: Medium Armor Master
desc: No Stealth disadvantage. +3 DEX to AC (not +2).

name: Mobile
desc: +10 ft speed. Dash ignores difficult terrain. No OA from melee targets.

name: Moderately Armored
desc: Medium armor + shield proficiency.

name: Mounted Combatant
desc: Advantage vs smaller unmounted. Redirect mount attacks. Mount evasion.

name: Observant
desc: +5 passive Perception and Investigation. Read lips.

name: Polearm Master
desc: Bonus action d4 butt-end attack. OA when creatures enter reach.

name: Resilient
desc: +1 to chosen ability + save proficiency for that ability.

name: Ritual Caster
desc: 2 ritual spells. Copy more from scrolls/books.

name: Savage Attacker
desc: 1/turn reroll melee damage dice, use either.

name: Sentinel
desc: OA sets speed to 0. OA even on Disengage. Reaction attack when ally targeted within 5 ft.

name: Sharpshooter
desc: No long range disadvantage. Ignore half/3/4 cover. -5 hit/+10 damage.

name: Shield Master
desc: Bonus action shield shove. +shield AC to DEX saves. Reaction: no damage on DEX save success.

name: Skilled
desc: 3 skill or tool proficiencies.

name: Skulker
desc: Hide in light obscurement. Missed ranged attack stays hidden. Dim light no Perception penalty.

name: Spell Sniper
desc: Double attack spell range. Ignore half/3/4 cover. 1 attack cantrip.

name: Tavern Brawler
desc: Improvised weapon proficiency. 1d4 unarmed. Bonus action grapple on hit.

name: Tough
desc: +2 HP per level (current and future).

name: War Caster
desc: Advantage concentration saves. Somatic with full hands. Spell as OA.

name: Weapon Master
desc: 4 weapon proficiencies.

name: Fey Touched
desc: Misty Step + 1 divination/enchantment spell (1/long rest free).

name: Shadow Touched
desc: Invisibility + 1 illusion/necromancy spell (1/long rest free).

name: Telekinetic
desc: Invisible Mage Hand. Bonus action: shove 30 ft (STR save, 5 ft).

name: Telepathic
desc: 60 ft telepathy. Detect Thoughts 1/long rest free.

name: Crusher
desc: Bludgeon: move target 5 ft. Crit: advantage on attacks vs target.

name: Piercer
desc: Pierce: reroll 1 damage die. Crit: +1 damage die.

name: Slasher
desc: Slash: -10 ft speed. Crit: disadvantage on target's attacks.

name: Skill Expert
desc: 1 skill proficiency + 1 expertise.

name: Chef
desc: Cook's utensils proficiency. Short rest: 1d8 extra HP. Long rest: temp HP treats.

name: Fighting Initiate
desc: 1 Fighter Fighting Style.

name: Eldritch Adept
desc: 1 Eldritch Invocation.

name: Metamagic Adept
desc: 2 Metamagic options + 2 sorcery points.

name: Gunner
desc: Firearms proficiency. Ignore loading. No 5 ft disadvantage.

name: Poisoner
desc: Bonus action poison application. Poisoner's kit proficiency. Craft potent poison.
